overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through an industrial urban district of Night City. The character navigates streets beneath elevated highways, passes construction sites, crosses intersections, and approaches the Arasaka corporate building under bright midday sun with clear skies.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the industrial street following an NPC in white shirt and shorts, passing construction barriers on the right

notable_agents.action: NPC in white shirt and shorts walking ahead of ego, leading the way down the street

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel highway structure spanning across the left side of the street with yellow warning lights
tall metal lattice electricity pylon with multiple power lines running across the scene
gray concrete industrial structure with construction barriers and equipment along the sidewalk
orange and white striped plastic barriers blocking off a construction area

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of an industrial urban street dominated by a massive elevated highway overpass on the left. The character walks forward following an NPC, passing construction barriers and industrial buildings. Power transmission towers rise in the distance against a clear blue sky, and the lighting is bright midday sun with harsh shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with corporate building view

events.description: turns left at intersection revealing the Arasaka corporate building in the distance
waits at red traffic light before crossing the intersection with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and crossing the street with a group of pedestrians, heading toward the Arasaka building

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab driving through the intersection

entered.detail: tall modern skyscraper with distinctive architecture and corporate signage visible in the distance
standard traffic signal showing red light at the intersection
large yellow construction crane visible behind buildings

segments.scene_description: The character turns left at an intersection, transitioning from the enclosed industrial street to a more open urban area. The massive Arasaka corporate building becomes visible in the distance. The character waits at a traffic light and crosses the street with other pedestrians while a taxi passes by. The elevated highway remains visible but now spans across the center of the view.

events.description: enters underpass beneath elevated highway with large satellite dishes becoming visible
crosses street at marked crosswalk with blue and yellow stripes

agents.ego_description: walking under the elevated highway structure toward the satellite dish installation, crossing a marked crosswalk

entered.detail: array of large white satellite dishes and communication antennas visible in the distance
marked pedestrian crossing with blue and yellow stripes on the asphalt
green street name signs mounted on traffic light poles

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath the massive elevated highway structure, entering a semi-covered underpass area. Large satellite dishes become visible in the distance, indicating a communications facility. The character crosses a marked crosswalk with distinctive blue and yellow stripes. The Arasaka building remains visible on the left while the highway structure dominates overhead.

events.description: transitions from street to sidewalk alongside the Arasaka building

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk under the elevated highway, approaching the base of the Arasaka corporate building

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange jacket walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: concrete pedestrian walkway with red painted curb running alongside the street
illuminated Arasaka corporate logo and signage on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking along a concrete sidewalk directly beneath the elevated highway, approaching the imposing Arasaka corporate building which now dominates the left side of the frame. The satellite dishes have passed out of view. The character passes other pedestrians on the sidewalk while the massive corporate structure looms larger with its illuminated signage visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gritty industrial corridor that gradually opens into a wide urban vista dominated by corporate architecture. It begins on a street beneath a massive elevated highway overpass, following a character past construction barriers and industrial buildings under a bright midday sun. As the character reaches an intersection, the camera turns left, shifting from the enclosed industrial surroundings to a more open city environment where power transmission towers give way to the distant silhouette of the Arasaka corporate building. The scene then expands as the character waits at a traffic light and crosses the street alongside other pedestrians and a passing taxi, while the highway overpass shifts to span across the center of the view.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a concrete industrial underpass that gradually opens up to reveal the imposing scale of a corporate monolith. It begins with the character walking beneath a massive elevated highway, crossing a blue and yellow striped crosswalk while distant satellite dishes mark a communications facility. As the character continues forward, the highway structure remains dominant overhead, but the perspective shifts as the satellite dishes fade from view. The scene then expands along a concrete sidewalk filled with pedestrians, where the Arasaka corporate building increasingly dominates the left side of the frame. Finally, the camera closes in on the massive structure, its illuminated signage looming large against the bright midday sky.
